name: Ondo Finance

events.category: Ecosystem Growth (792M) + Protocol Development (825M) + Private Sales (322M)
events.notes: Major cliff unlock representing ~57% of circulating supply at the time. Split: 792M ecosystem, 825M development, 322M private sales.
Next major cliff unlock scheduled for January 2027. Similar magnitude to January 2025 event.

unlocks.summary: ONDO follows a 5-year linear vesting schedule starting January 2024 with cliff releases. Major releases occurred January 2025 (1.94B tokens) and March 2026 (184.5M). Another major cliff of ~1.94B is scheduled for January 2027. Approximately 5.1B tokens (~51%) remain locked through 2029, creating persistent unlock pressure.
unlocks.caveats: Exact cliff amounts for 2028-2029 not fully detailed in available sources. Vesting schedule uses cliff mechanism (all-at-once releases rather than continuous drip). Allocation breakdown: Ecosystem Growth 52.11%, Protocol Development 33.00%, Private Sales 12.90%, Community Access Sale 1.99%.

mechanism.value_accrual_summary: ONDO is a governance-only token with no direct value capture. Protocol revenue (~0.15% management fee on USDY/OUSG products, yielding ~$54k monthly from USDY) goes to DAO treasury, NOT to token holders. USDY/OUSG yields accrue to product holders, not ONDO holders. Token's value depends purely on governance scope expansion and ecosystem adoption sentiment.

inflation.method: Fixed 10B max supply with no new issuance. All circulating tokens come from scheduled unlocks of the original 10B allocation.
inflation.trend_next_24m: No monetary inflation. However, 5.1B tokens (~51% of max supply) will unlock through 2029, creating 51% dilution of current circulating supply IF all unlock. January 2027 cliff (~1.94B tokens) poses near-term sell pressure risk.
inflation.rationale: ONDO has no programmatic minting or emission schedule beyond the pre-set vesting schedule. The 'inflation' is supply-side dilution from vesting cliffs, not monetary expansion. This is distinct from inflationary tokens but still represents substantial future circulation increase.

data_collection_notes: Research conducted April 29, 2026 using publicly available sources (WebSearch + accessible web pages via WebFetch). Direct API access blocked. Key findings: (1) Circulating supply is 48.69% of max, with 51.31% locked through 2029. (2) Major unlock cliffs create significant dilution events (Jan 2025 was 1.94B, Jan 2027 expected ~1.94B). (3) ONDO has NO direct value capture—governance token only. Fees on USDY/OUSG products go to treasury, yields go to product holders, not ONDO holders. (4) No staking, no burns, no inflation beyond vesting. (5) FDV-to-MC gap: $2.58B FDV vs $1.26B market cap = 2.05x gap, reflecting unlock risk. (6) TVL recently hit $3B (April 2026), up 31% in 30 days, indicating strong institutional adoption despite governance token limitation. Critical caveat: ONDO value depends entirely on governance scope and ecosystem growth—no direct cash flow to holders.
